name: Borrow Item
use_case:
Use Case ID: UC001
Use Case Name: Borrow Item
Pre-Condition: Checking members of the library
Post-Condition: Borrow items successfully
Priority: High

Flow of Event:
1. The system shows GUI for a list of items to borrow
2. Member select items to borrow
3. Member confirm borrow items [A1]
4. The system records the borrowed items
5. The system displays a list of borrowed items

Alternative Flow:
[A1] If click "Cancel" button, the system will not records [E1]

Exception Flow:
[E1] The system shows the warning "Confirm cancellation?"
